title: quercus lanuginosa subsp. congesta
intro: Quercus lanuginosa subsp. congesta is a sub-species of the Quercus lanuginosa tree, native to China, characterized by its small leaves and compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa subsp. congesta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Quercus lanuginosa subsp. congesta can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
